name: intention-extension
description: Tests and dev tooling for the Intention browser extension (Chrome / Firefox / Apple variants).

scripts.dev:chrome:manual:
node -e "console.log('
Load the Chrome extension unpacked:
  1. Open chrome://extensions
  2. Enable Developer mode (top-right)
  3. Click "Load unpacked"
  4. Select the "Intention Chrome" folder in this repo
  5. Reload it from chrome://extensions after any source change
')"
scripts.dev:android: ./build.sh --android && cd "Intention Android" && ./gradlew installDebug && adb shell am start -n com.maybeitsadam.intention/.MainActivity
